items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Luce series mini tri-fold wallet. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this petite mini zip wallet with design essence. Brown leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and brown pattern. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, brown leather trim, light gold-tone metal hardware, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo zip pull.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length).
